message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate 7-9 block files to withInlineBlock

Migrate additional module files to use the withInlineBlock callback
pattern for safer inline block handling:

- heapq_mod.zig (7 blocks)
- _io_mod.zig (7 blocks)
- statistics_mod.zig (9 blocks)
- traceback_mod.zig (9 blocks)
- collections_mod.zig (7 of 8 blocks - genChainMap left due to iteration)

Also includes previously migrated 3-6 block files from prior batch.
